markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Udemy and GrowthX to align on web resource development, content strategy, and next steps for their collaborative microsite project.](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Web Resource Development**: Need urgent alignment on web resourcing; Kyle to follow up with Jennifer via Slack and meet with Krista next week to accelerate momentum](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Content Strategy**: Consensus to move beyond generic skills data toward more specific, credibility-building content showing how skills are changing and connecting to business outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Persona Approach**: Focus on CTOs and line-of-business leaders (vs L\&D buyers) with specific, actionable content that differentiates from general McKinsey-type reports](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Visual Direction**: Need to calibrate on text vs. visual content approach and define which elements will rely on Udemy resources vs. GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

## Topics

### Microsite Prototype and Direction

  - [GrowthX presented a rough prototype microsite design showing how the newsletter content could be expanded into a broader resource hub](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Design includes areas for featured content, leadership spotlights, trending skills data visualization, and downloadable assets](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Veronika emphasized the need to focus on Udemy-specific skills that deliver business outcomes, rather than generic upskilling frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Team discussed differentiating from competitors like Coursera by highlighting hands-on projects and real-world applications of skills](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Content Depth and Differentiation Strategy

  - [Discussion about finding the right "altitude" for content—avoiding both overly generic (already covered by McKinsey/HBR) and hyper-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Need to build Udemy's credibility by showing deep understanding of how skills and roles are evolving (e.g., cybersecurity transitioning to LLM pen testing)](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Key opportunity: highlighting the gap between AI investment and actual production deployment (only 2% making it to production)](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Challenge of balancing thought leadership content vs Udemy-forward messaging that showcases their unique data and perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Data Utilization and Skills Insights

  - [Agreement that generic "top 10 skills" lists are too surface-level and don't provide meaningful differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Better approach: show why skills are trending, what business outcomes they drive, and how they're evolving over time](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Veronika shared example of an instructor (Donner) whose students at major companies build real projects and share them on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Team discussed leveraging these success stories to demonstrate credibility and real-world application of Udemy courses](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### Content Planning and Resource Audit

  - [GrowthX has begun a content audit with \~60 pieces categorized, but more comprehensive inventory needed](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Kyle will follow up with Glenn regarding an existing content audit that might accelerate this process](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Need to identify content gaps based on prioritized themes and topics](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Goal to start calibrating on content creation by end of next week to build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to ping Jennifer in Slack channel about web resourcing options](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Veronika to share example LinkedIn posts from instructor Donner showing student projects](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up with Glenn about potential existing content audit to accelerate planning](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop more specific topics from the themes for team feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Veronika to send additional data this week, with note that course descriptions and taglines can also be used as data sources](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Team to align on visual vs. text content approach and define respective resource responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/VX4WRypHsq3LXdjKtFVsQSMc5cbcEjns?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
